title: Question Carousel: Tech Stack Priorities
description: Gather technology preferences for Phase 3 architecture decisions

question.text: What is the primary technology selection priority for this project?

options.label: Team Familiarity
options.description: Prioritise technologies the team already knows
options.consequences: Faster development, lower learning curve, may miss better-fit alternatives

options.label: Best Fit
options.description: Choose the best technology for the problem regardless of current expertise
options.consequences: Optimal solution, potentially slower ramp-up, may require training

options.label: Ecosystem
options.description: Prioritise a cohesive ecosystem (e.g., all-in on Next.js, or all-in on Django)
options.consequences: Consistent patterns, shared tooling, fewer integration challenges

options.label: Cost
options.consequences: Budget-friendly, may require trade-offs on features or performance
